creator: thefloridaqueenie
caption:
Looking for things to do in Florida? 

This spot (plus 1,000+ more) is in my  Florida Travel Guide + Interactive Map perfect for weekend getaways, road trips, and exploring without hours of research and stress!

💬 Comment “GUIDE” and I’ll send it to you!

FloridaRAMA is a wildly colorful, immersive art experience in St. Pete that feels like you stepped into a fever dream. Every room is interactive, over-the-top, and packed with hidden details inspired by Florida culture — from funky flamingos to surreal swamp scenes and glowing citrus.
This isn’t a “look but don’t touch” museum.
It’s a wander, explore, open-the-secret-door, take-100-photos kind of place.

🎟️ Ticket Prices (approx.)
• Adults: $27–$32 depending on day/time
• Kids (ages 4–12): around $17–$20
• 3 & under: Free
(Prices vary by peak hours and special events.)

🕐 Hours
• Generally open Wednesday–Sunday
• Typical hours: 11 AM – 7 PM
• Extended evening hours on select days
(Always check their site before you go for updated seasonal hours.)

📍 Address
2606 Fairfield Ave S
St. Petersburg, FL 33712

🌴 What You Can Do There
• Walk through immersive, interactive art rooms
• Discover hidden doors + secret installations
• Snap colorful, surreal pics
• Shop quirky Florida-inspired merch
• Grab a drink during special events or night experiences

#floridarama #stpete #thingstodoinflorida #tampaflorida #immersiveartexperience
